headline: Are Low Margins Hurting Gold.com Despite Its Strong Revenue Base?

headline: A Look At Coinbase (COIN) Valuation After OCC Approval For National Trust Bank Custody Role
summary: OCC approval shifts focus to Coinbase’s role as a regulated custodian The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency has granted Coinbase Global (COIN) conditional approval to form a national trust bank, a move that could reshape how institutions access digital asset custody and payment services. This conditional charter would allow Coinbase to operate as a federally regulated custodian, safeguarding client assets and acting on their behalf in payments and transactions, once remaining...

headline: Coinbase (COIN) Is Up 8.7% After Winning Conditional National Trust Bank Approval – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Coinbase Global recently received conditional approval from the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to form a national trust bank, allowing it to operate as a federally supervised custodian and expand institutional-grade custody and payments services. This regulatory milestone strengthens Coinbase’s credibility with large clients and could broaden its role as core infrastructure in the evolving digital-asset financial system. We’ll now explore how national trust bank status could...
